Alex, a conservative reader, has recently started reading novels that explore diverse perspectives on love and relationships. Over the past month, Alex has read 3 different novels, each challenging their traditional views. The first novel took Alex 4 days to finish, and it contained 120 pages. The second novel was longer, with 180 pages, which took Alex 6 days to complete. The third novel was the longest, with 240 pages, and it took Alex 8 days to finish. If Alex read the same number of pages each day for each novel, calculate the total number of pages Alex read per day on average across all three novels.
